events.description:
Traveler: Sarah Johnson
Booking Ref: PTT-2026-4589
Flight: Japan Airlines JL 001
Depart: San Francisco (SFO) 11:30 AM on April 10, 2026
Arrive: Tokyo Narita (NRT) 3:30 PM on April 11, 2026 (+1 day)
Duration: 11h 0m
Seat: 32K
Notes: Outbound international flight. Times as provided in itinerary.

Ticket: Prepaid — show email
Traveler: Sarah Johnson

events.title: Japan Airlines JL 002 - NRT to SFO (Return)
events.location: Tokyo Narita Airport (NRT) → San Francisco International Airport (SFO)
events.description:
Traveler: Sarah Johnson
Booking Ref: PTT-2026-4589
Flight: Japan Airlines JL 002
Depart: Tokyo Narita (NRT) 5:00 PM on April 18, 2026
Arrive: San Francisco (SFO) 10:30 AM (same day, as listed)

Notes: Return international flight. Times as provided in itinerary. Arrival listed as "same day" by itinerary; local timezone differences may apply.
